api_info.description: A free, open API providing daily, weekly, and monthly horoscope predictions for all zodiac signs, as well as tarot card data including all 78 cards of the major and minor arcana.

conversion.notes: Spec created from public API documentation. No authentication required. Also considered ohmanda.com/api/horoscope (simpler, daily only) and aztro API (domain unreachable). Selected freehoroscopeapi.com for its richer feature set including multiple horoscope periods and tarot card endpoints.
